rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JASON LHOTKA BY ELENA LHOTKA, et al VS. GEORAPHIC EXPEDITONS, INC., ALSO DOING BUSINESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Deft'S Responses To Plf'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, February 9, 2011. Line 1. PLAINTIFF THE ESTATE OF JASON LHOTKA BY ELENA LHOTKA,, ELENA LHOTKA, NICHOLAS LHOTKA AND SANDRA MENEFEE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. Motion for further responses to Plaintiff's request for Production of Documents GRANTED as follows: Request 10 Granted, Presentations, notes and logs regarding risk managment are relevant and reasonably calculated to lead to discoverable evidence. Request 16, 18-20, 24, 28 and 43 (call logs) GRANTED IN PART. It appears 3rd. party entities are in possession of certain logs, if they exist and movant has failed to show defendant has those logs or control over the entities. However it appears defendant does have copies of some of the information (eg. field notes) Defendant must produce copies of the information it does have. Request 37, 38, 41, 43 and 45 Motion Granted. The purpose of the litigation privilege is to bar derivative tort claim based on statements made during the course of litigation. Further, these report do not appear to have been made in anticipation of litigation but to review what occurred. Request for sanctions is Denied. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, February 9, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANTS 3360-62 LAGUNA STREET LLC, WALTER CHEN, AND XIAO CHEN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER AS TO WALTER CHEN IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE DISMISSAL FILED FEBRUARY 1, 2011. THE DEMURRER AS TO DEFENDANT XIAO QING CHEN IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD ALTER EGO LIABILITY OR OTHER FACTS SHOWING INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS GROUND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD THE TIME AND MANNER OF DISCOVERY AND INABILITY TO HAVE MADE EARLIER DISCOVERY DESPITE REASONABLE DILIGENCE. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. =(302/LMG)
